# AI Memex Entry Templates

Copy the appropriate template when creating a new entry.

## Pattern Entry

```yaml
---
title: "Pattern: [Descriptive Name]"
description: "[One sentence: what problem this solves]"
entry_type: pattern
published_date: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm zzz"
last_updated_date: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm zzz"
tags: "[tech], [domain], patterns"
related_skill: ""
source_project: ""
---

## Discovery

[What happened that led to discovering this pattern]

## Root Cause

[Why the problem occurred or why this approach works]

## Solution

[The pattern itself — code examples, configuration, steps]

## Prevention

[How to avoid the problem in the future, or when to apply this pattern proactively]
```

## Research Entry

```yaml
---
title: "Research: [Topic]"
description: "[One sentence: what was evaluated]"
entry_type: research
published_date: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm zzz"
last_updated_date: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm zzz"
tags: "[tech], research"
related_skill: ""
source_project: ""
---

## Context

[Why this research was needed]

## Options Considered

### Option A: [Name]
- **Pros**: ...
- **Cons**: ...

### Option B: [Name]
- **Pros**: ...
- **Cons**: ...

## Evaluation Criteria

[What factors mattered most]

## Recommendation

[Which option was chosen and why]

## Trade-offs

[What was sacrificed and why it's acceptable]
```

## Reference Entry

```yaml
---
title: "[System/Component Name]"
description: "[One sentence: what this reference covers]"
entry_type: reference
published_date: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm zzz"
last_updated_date: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm zzz"
tags: "[tech], [domain]"
related_skill: ""
source_project: ""
---

## Overview

[What this system/component does and why it exists]

## Key Components

[Architecture, modules, important files]

## Usage Examples

[How to use it — code snippets, commands]

## Gotchas

[Non-obvious things to watch out for]
```

## Project Report Entry

```yaml
---
title: "Project Report: [Feature/Milestone Name]"
description: "[One sentence: what was accomplished]"
entry_type: project-report
published_date: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm zzz"
last_updated_date: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm zzz"
tags: "[project-slug], [tech]"
related_skill: ""
source_project: ""
---

## Objective

[What we set out to do]

## Approach

[How we did it — key decisions, tools, timeline]

## Outcome

[What was delivered — metrics, before/after]

## Lessons Learned

[What worked, what didn't, what we'd do differently]
```

## Blog Post Entry

```yaml
---
title: "[Observation or Insight]"
description: "[One sentence: the key takeaway]"
entry_type: blog-post
published_date: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm zzz"
last_updated_date: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm zzz"
tags: "ai-collaboration, [topic]"
related_skill: ""
source_project: ""
---

## Observation

[What was noticed during the session]

## Context

[What work was being done when this came up]

## Reflection

[Deeper analysis — why this matters]

## Takeaway

[The actionable insight for future sessions]
```
